description: Richard Liu discusses the concept of PayFi, emphasizing the need for faster, more efficient money movement globally. He highlights the inefficiencies in current payment systems and introduces PayFi as a solution leveraging blockchain technology to revolutionize payments.
topic_summary: In this talk, Richard Liu explains the limitations of traditional payment systems and presents PayFi as a blockchain-based solution to enhance the speed and accessibility of money transfers, particularly in high-density financial hubs like New York [t=186.15].
